caption: No one has given more to their sport. Or left it all on the court every single time. @RafaelNadal, you showed us what it takes to be the greatest. It only takes everything.

The best athletes are open books.
They’ll tell you exactly what they’re about to do.
Because they know.
There’s nothing you can do about it.
